name: Travel Airplane
desc: The ultimate symbol for air travel and international trips. Perfect for flight bookings, vacation announcements, and jet-setting lifestyle content.

name: Travel Luggage
desc: Represents the act of packing and preparing for a trip. High SEO value for travel tips, packing hacks, and baggage handling services.

name: Travel World Map
desc: Symbolizes trip planning and global exploration. Ideal for travel itineraries, geography content, and 'wanderlust' social media posts.

name: Travel Beach Vacation
desc: The go-to icon for summer holidays and tropical travel. Used for promoting resorts, seaside getaways, and relaxing coastal tours.

name: Travel Hotel Stay
desc: Represents hospitality and overnight travel accommodations. Essential for hotel reviews, booking platforms, and luxury staycation content.

name: Travel Sightseeing
desc: Symbolizes visiting famous landmarks and city tourism. Great for travel guides, urban exploration, and international sightseeing tours.

name: Travel Public Transport
desc: Represents local commuting and urban traveling. Perfect for city transit apps, subway guides, and sustainable travel topics.

name: Travel Road Trip
desc: The primary symbol for driving vacations and domestic travel. Ideal for car rental promotions, scenic route guides, and family road trips.

name: Travel Cruise Ship
desc: Specifically for maritime travel and luxury cruises. Targeted at cruise line marketing, island hopping, and nautical adventures.

name: Travel Mountain Hiking
desc: Represents adventure travel and outdoor exploration. Used for trekking, camping, and promoting national park visits.

name: Travel Photography
desc: Captures the essence of documenting a trip. Perfect for travel influencers, photography gear reviews, and vacation memory sharing.

name: Travel Passport Control
desc: Symbolizes border crossings and international travel requirements. Essential for visa information, customs guides, and global mobility.
